subcodes.first_line: My spirit and my soul be a sacrifice unto Thee, O Spirit, through Whom the fragrance of the Spirit wafteth from the direction of Thy nearness and sweet perfumes are diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی و نفسی لک الفداء یا روحا بما فاحت نفحه الروح عن جهه قربک و تضوعت رائحه
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God
full_text_parts: I beg Thee to forgive me, O my Lord, for every mention but the mention of Thee, and for every praise but the praise of Thee, and for every delight but delight in Thy nearness, and for every pleasure but the pleasure of communion with Thee, and for every joy but the joy of Thy love and of Thy good-pleasure, and for all things pertaining unto me which bear no relationship unto Thee, O Thou Who art the Lord of lords, He Who provideth the means and unlocketh the doors.
